text: <@U2NVP001SAL> has joined the channel
<@U2NVP002SEC> has joined the channel
<@U2NVP003LEG> has joined the channel
<@U2NVP004ENG> has joined the channel

Hi all — welcome to the NovaPulse security and compliance channel.
I've added David from our security team as well so he can handle the technical questions directly.
Dev, Karen, James — fire away whenever you're ready.

elements.text:
Hi all — welcome to the NovaPulse security and compliance channel.
I've added David from our security team as well so he can handle the technical questions directly.
Dev, Karen, James — fire away whenever you're ready.

text:
Thanks for setting this up.
First question — we're EU-headquartered with a UK subsidiary.
Where exactly is our data stored?

elements.text:
Thanks for setting this up.
First question — we're EU-headquartered with a UK subsidiary.
Where exactly is our data stored?

text:
EU customers are assigned to AWS eu-central-1 (Frankfurt) by default.
That's your primary storage and compute region.

elements.text:
EU customers are assigned to AWS eu-central-1 (Frankfurt) by default.
That's your primary storage and compute region.

text:
Disaster recovery replication is EU-to-EU only — never crosses to US East or any non-EU region.
Your UK subsidiary data can also be stored in Frankfurt or we can assign it to a UK region — your choice.

elements.text:
Disaster recovery replication is EU-to-EU only — never crosses to US East or any non-EU region.
Your UK subsidiary data can also be stored in Frankfurt or we can assign it to a UK region — your choice.

text:
Good.
What certifications do you hold?

elements.text:
Good.
What certifications do you hold?

text:
Current active certifications:
- SOC 2 Type II (most recent audit period ending March 2025)
- ISO 27001:2022 (issued January 2025)
- GDPR Article 28 DPA compliant
- EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework listed
- HIPAA BAA available for qualifying customers

elements.text:
Current active certifications:
- SOC 2 Type II (most recent audit period ending March 2025)
- ISO 27001:2022 (issued January 2025)
- GDPR Article 28 DPA compliant
- EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework listed
- HIPAA BAA available for qualifying customers

text: SOC 2 Type II — can we get a copy of that report?

elements.text: SOC 2 Type II — can we get a copy of that report?

text:
Yes — available under NDA for qualified prospects.
I'll send Ryan the NDA template and we can get that signed and the report over to you within 48 hours.

elements.text:
Yes — available under NDA for qualified prospects.
I'll send Ryan the NDA template and we can get that signed and the report over to you within 48 hours.

text:
Works for me.
Encryption question — how is data encrypted at rest?
And who holds the keys?

elements.text:
Encryption question — how is data encrypted at rest?
And who holds the keys?

text:
AES-256-GCM at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit.
Keys are managed via AWS KMS with automatic annual rotation by default.
On Enterprise plans you can configure 90-day rotation.

elements.text:
AES-256-GCM at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit.
Keys are managed via AWS KMS with automatic annual rotation by default.
On Enterprise plans you can configure 90-day rotation.

text:
Our policy is that we manage our own encryption keys.
Is BYOK supported?

elements.text:
Our policy is that we manage our own encryption keys.
Is BYOK supported?

text:
Yes — BYOK is available on Enterprise plans.
We support HashiCorp Vault, AWS KMS, Azure Key Vault, and Google Cloud KMS.

elements.text:
Yes — BYOK is available on Enterprise plans.
We support HashiCorp Vault, AWS KMS, Azure Key Vault, and Google Cloud KMS.

text:
With BYOK, NovaPulse never holds a copy of your keys.
Any decryption operation requires a live call to your KMS — which means your own audit logs capture every access attempt independently of ours.

elements.text:
With BYOK, NovaPulse never holds a copy of your keys.
Any decryption operation requires a live call to your KMS — which means your own audit logs capture every access attempt independently of ours.

text:
That's exactly what our InfoSec team needs to hear.
We use Azure Key Vault so that integration is straightforward for us.

elements.text:
That's exactly what our InfoSec team needs to hear.
We use Azure Key Vault so that integration is straightforward for us.

text:
Karen here — legal question.
Is the DPA included in the standard MSA or do we have to request it separately?

elements.text:
Karen here — legal question.
Is the DPA included in the standard MSA or do we have to request it separately?

text:
It's included as a standard exhibit in all MSAs — no separate request needed.
Covers all GDPR Article 28 obligations, sub-processor disclosure, data subject rights support, breach notification, and deletion.

elements.text:
It's included as a standard exhibit in all MSAs — no separate request needed.
Covers all GDPR Article 28 obligations, sub-processor disclosure, data subject rights support, breach notification, and deletion.

text:
Our DPO will want to review the sub-processor list.
Where is that published?

elements.text:
Our DPO will want to review the sub-processor list.
Where is that published?

text:
privacy.novapulse.io — publicly accessible, always current.
Any additions or changes to sub-processors come with 30 days written notice under the DPA terms.

elements.text:
privacy.novapulse.io — publicly accessible, always current.
Any additions or changes to sub-processors come with 30 days written notice under the DPA terms.

text:
Good.
We'll also need a custom DPA — our DPO has specific clauses around health-adjacent data we collect on employees.

elements.text:
Good.
We'll also need a custom DPA — our DPO has specific clauses around health-adjacent data we collect on employees.

text:
Totally doable.
Custom DPAs are reviewed by our legal team — typically adds 2-4 weeks to the deal cycle.
Fee is waived on Business and Enterprise plans.
Just email legal@novapulse.io with subject: "Custom DPA Request — [your company name]" to kick it off.

elements.text:
Totally doable.
Custom DPAs are reviewed by our legal team — typically adds 2-4 weeks to the deal cycle.
Fee is waived on Business and Enterprise plans.
Just email legal@novapulse.io with subject: "Custom DPA Request — [your company name]" to kick it off.

text:
Will do.
One more — what happens to our data if we terminate the contract?

elements.text:
Will do.
One more — what happens to our data if we terminate the contract?

text:
30 days post-termination to export everything — CSV, JSON, Parquet — via Admin Console or API.
No per-GB export fees, it's all included.

elements.text:
30 days post-termination to export everything — CSV, JSON, Parquet — via Admin Console or API.
No per-GB export fees, it's all included.

text:
After that window: production data deleted within 14 days, backup data within 90 days.
We issue a signed deletion certificate automatically.

elements.text:
After that window: production data deleted within 14 days, backup data within 90 days.
We issue a signed deletion certificate automatically.

text:
Signed deletion cert is important for our GDPR obligations.
Good.

elements.text:
Signed deletion cert is important for our GDPR obligations.
Good.

text: Thread from me on MFA — what methods do you support?

elements.text: Thread from me on MFA — what methods do you support?

text:
TOTP (Google Authenticator, Authy, any RFC 6238 compliant app), FIDO2/WebAuthn hardware keys (YubiKey etc.), and push notification via the NovaPulse mobile app.
Admins can enforce MFA at org, team, or role level from the Admin Console.

elements.text:
TOTP (Google Authenticator, Authy, any RFC 6238 compliant app), FIDO2/WebAuthn hardware keys (YubiKey etc.), and push notification via the NovaPulse mobile app.
Admins can enforce MFA at org, team, or role level from the Admin Console.

text:
We require hardware keys for privileged users.
FIDO2 support is good.

elements.text:
We require hardware keys for privileged users.
FIDO2 support is good.

text: What's the breach notification timeline?

elements.text: What's the breach notification timeline?

text:
72 hours from confirmed breach — in line with GDPR Article 33.
Notification includes: nature of the incident, categories of data affected, estimated records involved, likely consequences, and measures taken or proposed.
A named security contact is assigned to your team for the duration of the incident response.

elements.text:
72 hours from confirmed breach — in line with GDPR Article 33.
Notification includes: nature of the incident, categories of data affected, estimated records involved, likely consequences, and measures taken or proposed.
A named security contact is assigned to your team for the duration of the incident response.

text:
72hrs and a named contact — that's better than most vendors.
One final one for me — what's the P1 response SLA?

elements.text:
72hrs and a named contact — that's better than most vendors.
One final one for me — what's the P1 response SLA?

text:
Depends on plan:
Business: 2 hours, 24/7
Enterprise: 1 hour, 24/7 with named Technical Account Manager
Uptime SLA is 99.95% on Business, up to 99.99% on Enterprise dedicated infra.

elements.text:
Depends on plan:
Business: 2 hours, 24/7
Enterprise: 1 hour, 24/7 with named Technical Account Manager
Uptime SLA is 99.95% on Business, up to 99.99% on Enterprise dedicated infra.

text:
Okay — I've seen enough to recommend this goes to formal evaluation.
David can you send me the pen test executive summary as well when you send the SOC 2 report?

elements.text:
Okay — I've seen enough to recommend this goes to formal evaluation.
David can you send me the pen test executive summary as well when you send the SOC 2 report?

text: Absolutely — SOC 2 report, ISO 27001 certificate, and pen test exec summary all coming your way once the NDA is signed.

elements.text: Absolutely — SOC 2 report, ISO 27001 certificate, and pen test exec summary all coming your way once the NDA is signed.

text:
I'll also need the standard MSA draft to start the redline.
Can Ryan send that over?

elements.text:
I'll also need the standard MSA draft to start the redline.
Can Ryan send that over?

text:
On it — MSA draft, NDA for the security pack, and custom DPA initiation email all going out by end of day.
Thanks everyone — this was a great session :white_check_mark:

elements.text:
On it — MSA draft, NDA for the security pack, and custom DPA initiation email all going out by end of day.
